SEARCH
Package product

Class SecondHandProduct

java.lang.Object
product.Product
product.SecondHandProduct
public class SecondHandProduct extends product.Product
Class name: SecondHandProduct

Description: It implements the second-hand products

Version:
1.0
Author:
Duna P.R.
See Also:

    Constructor
    Description
    SecondHandProduct(double estimatedPrice, String name, String description, String photo, product.ProductType type, LocalDate valuationDate, boolean available, boolean paidValuation, product.ConservationStatus status)
    Creates a new second-hand product
    SecondHandProduct(String name, String description, String photo, product.ProductType type)
    Creates a new second-hand product that hasn't paid the valuation
    SecondHandProduct(String name, String description, String photo, product.ProductType type, boolean available, boolean paidValuation, product.ConservationStatus status)
    Creates a new second-hand product with no valuation

  • Constructor Details

    • SecondHandProduct

      public SecondHandProduct(double estimatedPrice, String name, String description, String photo, product.ProductType type, LocalDate valuationDate, boolean available, boolean paidValuation, product.ConservationStatus status)
      Creates a new second-hand product
      Parameters:
      estimatedPrice - , the estimated price of the product
      name - , the name of the product
      description - , the description of the product
      photo - , the photo of the product
      type - , the type of product
      valuationDate - , the date of the valuation
      available - , if the product is available
      paidValuation - , if the valuation is paid
      status - , the conservation status of the product

    • SecondHandProduct

      public SecondHandProduct(String name, String description, String photo, product.ProductType type, boolean available, boolean paidValuation, product.ConservationStatus status)
      Creates a new second-hand product with no valuation
      Parameters:
      name - , the name of the product
      description - , the description of the product
      photo - , the photo of the product
      type - , the type of product
      available - , if the product is available
      paidValuation - , if the valuation is paid
      status - , the conservation status of the product

    • SecondHandProduct

      public SecondHandProduct(String name, String description, String photo, product.ProductType type)
      Creates a new second-hand product that hasn't paid the valuation
      Parameters:
      name - , the name of the product
      description - , the description of the product
      photo - , the photo of the product
      type - , the type of product

    • getValuationDate

      public LocalDate getValuationDate()

      public boolean isAvailable()
      Obtains if the product is available

      true if the product is available, false if else

      Obtains if the valuations is paid
      Returns:
      true if the valuation is paid, false if else

      Parameters:
